3196980.name: Mystical Sovereign Z
3196980.description:
Mystical Sovereign Z is a handcrafted indie strategy game. The game consists of two parts: turn based campaign and real time battles. Both parts are based on controlling characters that can be manually customized.

Real time battles

  • Lead your armies in real time battles
  • Give orders to troops in squads, controlling their movement, formation and behaviour
  • Manually control individual characters

Turn based strategy

  • Lead your forces on the campaign
  • Recruit and manage characters
  • Assign army and squad leaders that give benefits to the troops they command
  • Attack and capture enemy provinces and manage your own provinces
  • Take care of the economy

Character customization

  • All characters can be customized
  • Characters have levels, which increase with their experience and have skills that can be increased
  • Different equipment and weapons can be purchased and assigned to each character, giving different benefits

Choices matter

  • Control the Imperial army on a frontier planet and defeat the rebels at any cost
  • Various choices on the campaign that affect the story
  • Multiple endings based on choices
3196980.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
